goal: forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { x0(x1) implies is_open_in_product[X, Y](x1) } implies is_open_in_product[X, Y](big_union[Pair[X, Y]](x0)) }

p.c: exists(k0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] -> Bool) { forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not k0(x0) or is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) } and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](big_union[Pair[X, Y]](k0)) }
let w0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] -> Bool satisfy { forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not w0(x0) or is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) } and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](big_union[Pair[X, Y]](w0)) }

p.c: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[X, Pair[X, Y]](pair_fst[X, Y])

goal: is_continuous[Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_snd[X, Y]) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { Y.is_open(x0) implies TopologicalSpace.is_open(set_preimage[Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_snd[X, Y], x0)) }
